name: libxmlsec1-nss10310
title: libxmlsec1-nss10310
summary: Nss engine for the XML security library
description:
Nss engine for the XML security library
The XML Security Library implements standards related to secure handling
of XML data.
.
This package provides dynamic libraries for use by applications.
Specifically, it provides the nss implementation of the XML security
library cryptography functions.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libxmlsec1-nss10310 because Nss engine for the XML security library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libxmlsec1-nss10310 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libxmlsec1-nss10310 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libxmlsec1-nss10310 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
